sections.paragraph:
Original: תּכלת

Transliteration: tekêleth

Phonetic: tek-ay'-leth

BDB Definition:

  1. violet, violet stuff
    1. violet thread
    2. violet stuff or fabric
  2. (TWOT) blue (covering spectrum from brilliant red through deep purple)

Origin: probably for H7827

TWOT entry: 2510

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
